name: ruby-unf
title: ruby-unf
summary: Wrapper library to bring Unicode Normalization Form support to Ruby
description:
Wrapper library to bring Unicode Normalization Form support to Ruby
This library allows code to be portable between Ruby implementations,
using 'unf_ext' under CRuby and 'java.text.Normalizer' on JRuby. It
normalizes UTF-8 strings into and from NFC, NFD, NFKC or NFKD
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-unf because Wrapper library to bring Unicode Normalization Form support to Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-unf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-unf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-unf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
